sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79591" key="parqenoko/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρθενο-κόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n79591.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking care of maidens, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:latinLit:phi0978.phi001:2:398" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.398</biblScope> </bibl> :—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρθενο-κομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
